title: A Guide to Gender
author: Anouchka Grose
subline: An essential introduction for the 21st century.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A long horizontal hairline (the spectrum). Along it, 12 dots representing different identities. The 7th dot is RED. Above and below, tiny gender glyphs from history. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <!-- The spectrum line -->
    <line x1="-700" y1="0" x2="700" y2="0" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- 12 dots evenly distributed, the 7th is RED -->
    <g fill="#cccccc">
      <circle cx="-700" cy="0" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="-580" cy="0" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="-460" cy="0" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="-340" cy="0" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="-220" cy="0" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="-100" cy="0" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
      <circle cx="100" cy="0" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="220" cy="0" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="340" cy="0" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="460" cy="0" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="580" cy="0" r="6"/>
      <circle cx="700" cy="0" r="6"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Whisper labels at the ends -->
    <text x="-700" y="-40" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">FEMME</text>
    <text x="700" y="-40" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">MASC</text>
    <!-- Center whisper -->
    <text x="0" y="-40" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">NONBINARY</text>
    <!-- A small note at the bottom about the book -->
    <text x="0" y="100" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">IDENTITY · EXPRESSION · SPECTRUM</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A horizontal spectrum line with 12 dots — the 7th (center) is RED and labeled 'NONBINARY'. The book is about reading gender as a continuum, not a binary. 220px whisper title at the bottom.
